text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During lunch break, I happen across El Condor
Pasa and Grass Wonder playing a game in the
central plaza.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer! Perfecto! Come judge our coin
flippin' match!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The rules are a cinch. I flip the coin, and Grass
calls heads or tails!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Sorry to spring this on you so suddenly. El was
just so happy she learned how to flip a coin.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Would you be willing to humor her for a short
while?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so I somewhat forcibly end up being the
referee for their game.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Heh heh heh! Let's get started!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: All right, Grass! Heads or tails?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hmm, what to choose? I'll go with... tails?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Pobrecita! It's heads! I win!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Heh heh heh! Wanna go next, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: May I have another go first?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Grass Wonder's trainer, I know just how much
she hates to lose. Is this game about to turn into a
battleground?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Which is it?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Perhaps... heads this time?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Nope! Tails!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: ...Tails?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Wrong!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: That's ten wins in a row for me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't know what Lady Luck has against her, but
Grass Wonder can't seem to win at all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And once again, as her trainer, I can sense that
behind her calm demeanor lies an inferno that's
only growing stronger!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
The lunch period is almost over, so let's do one
final round.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: One for all the marbles! Ready, vamos!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Dah! Wh-whoa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa fumbles before catching the coin,
allowing me to see that it landed on tails.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Phew! Nearly dropped it there! Now... which is it?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: The coin is hea...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Heads. The coin landed on heads.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Grass Wonder's chance to win it all ends in
failure.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your support, Trainer. I truly
appreciated the gesture.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
But... there's no point in winning if I don't do it on
my own.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The next day, I spot her in the library reading a book titled Probability.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Thank you, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Well... why don't we change things up a little? Which do you think it is, El?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Surely you can feel the difference between heads
and tails by now?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Oh? A battle of wits now, is it? You're on!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I think... tails!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Then... I'll take your word, El. The coin is tails,
no?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The battle for all the marbles comes to a close
with Grass Wonder's tactical adjustment resulting
in victory.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You know, Trainer, I think I might actually
have your support to thank for that victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Apparently Grass and El's contest triggers a
full-on coin-flipping fad in their class, and a few
days later, I see everyone outside playing
together.
